classes.name: threadlocal_aws.pep562.Pep562

methods.name: threadlocal_aws.pep562.Pep562.__init__
documentation: Acquire `__getattr__` and `__dir__`, but only replace module for versions less than Python 3.7.

methods.name: threadlocal_aws.pep562.Pep562.__dir__
documentation: Return the overridden `dir` if one was provided, else apply `dir` to the module.

methods.name: threadlocal_aws.pep562.Pep562.__getattr__
documentation: Attempt to retrieve the attribute from the module, and if missing, use the overridden function if present.

Backport of PEP 562 <https://pypi.org/search/?q=pep562>.

Wraps the module in a class that exposes the mechanics to override `__dir__` and `__getattr__`.
The given module will be searched for overrides of `__dir__` and `__getattr__` and use them when needed.

functions.name: threadlocal_aws.region
documentation: Get default region - the region of the instance if run in an EC2 instance
